positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a friendly, ethereal astronaut floating through a nebula sky. The astronaut is rendered with clean, matte white armor and a bubble-shaped transparent helmet that reflects deep cosmic blues, purples, and magenta. The background nebula should feature swirling patterns of vivid gas clouds, distant glowing stars, and subtle constellations, creating a sense of infinite depth. Focus on clean silhouettes, high contrast between the solid figure and the vibrant background, and a central, balanced composition. Vector illustration quality, perfect for textile printing, highly detailed, smooth gradients, 4k resolution.
negative: blur, artifacts, noise, text, watermark, low quality, bad anatomy, extra limbs, signature, logo, trademark, text-heavy, disfigured, graffiti, messy lines
